title: Bridge Essay: Examining interpersonal self-transcendence as a potential mechanism linking medi

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ultimate/Emptiness** (Phase 17) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Ultimate/Emptiness to mechanistic neuroscience through Examining, interpersonal, self-transcendence, as, a.

**Examining interpersonal self-transcendence as apotential mechanism linking meditation and social outcomes.** — Curr Opin Psychol. PMID: 30639834. DOI: 10.1016/j.copsyc.2018.12.007. Distinct types of meditation practice addressed in this review can help cultivate skills people may bring to later social interactions. We examine self-transcendence, or the drive to benefit others beyond the self, as akey mechanism through which meditation may promote positive social outcomes.
